title: Replace hardcoded Korean particle regex with kiwipiepy morphological analyzer
goal: 한국어 형태소 분석기 kiwipiepy를 도입하여 URL 뒤 조사 제거, 명령어 핵심어 추출을 자동화한다. 하드코딩된 조사 목록 대신 형태소 분석으로 자동 처리한다. kiwipiepy 미설치 시 기존 정규표현식으로 폴백한다.

test_requirements.expected: 네이버에서 검색해줘 → unchanged (네이버에서 is not a URL)

test_requirements.case: Fallback to regex when kiwipiepy not installed
test_requirements.expected: still strips common particles like 에서, 을, 를
뉴스 크롤링해줘 → keywords include 뉴스, 크롤링

test_requirements.case: strip_particles_from_url handles multiple URLs in command

constraints: kiwipiepy is optional — if not installed, fall back to existing regex approach
Do not remove the existing regex fallback, wrap it as the else branch
korean.py must be a standalone module importable without side effects
Do not modify any other files besides normalizer.py
Do not change detect_intent or other normalizer functions — only normalize_command
Existing normalizer tests must continue to pass
Add kiwipiepy to requirements-optional.txt if the file exists, otherwise create it
test_command: cd backend && python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -v
